zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud II de Bar於大約1122年出生在法國德 艾斯特姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar46歲，母親Gisèle de Vaudémont34歲。他於1155年與Agnès de Blois-Champagne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1170年11月25日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特姆斯沙吉米爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud II de Bar于大约1122年出生在法国德 艾斯特姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar46岁，母亲Gisèle de Vaudémont34岁。他于1155年与Agnès de Blois-Champagne结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1170年11月25日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在法国德 艾斯特姆斯沙吉米爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud II de Bar was born about 1122, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, France, his father, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, was 46 and his mother, Gisèle de Vaudémont, was 34. He married Agnès de Blois-Champagne in 1155. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 25 November 1170, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud II de Bar est né environ 1122, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, France, son père, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Vaudémont, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Blois-Champagne en 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1170, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud II de Bar um 1122 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar 46 und seine Mutter Gisèle de Vaudémont 34. Er hat 1155 Agnès de Blois-Champagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 25. November 1170 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud II de Bar è nato il circa 1122 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Gisèle de Vaudémont, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Blois-Champagne nel 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 25 novembre 1170, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud II de Barが約1122年にフランスグランド エストメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Barは46歳，母Gisèle de Vaudémontは34歳であった。1155年にAgnès de Blois-Champagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1170年11月25日に故郷で49歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストメウゼサイント-ミヒエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud II de Bar(이)가 대략 1122년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisèle de Vaudémont(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1155년 Agnès de Blois-Champagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1170년 11월 25일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 세인트-미히얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud II de Bar nasceu aproximadamente 1122, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Blois-Champagne em 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1170, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud II de Bar родился около 1122 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Vaudémont, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Blois-Champagne в 1155 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 25 ноября 1170 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-михиел, меус, гранд эст, Франция.

sm.from 1149 to 1170: mai le 1149 e o'o I le 1170

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Renaud II de Bar nació aproximadamente 1122, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Agnès de Blois-Champagne en 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1170, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia.
